title: Al-Ma'mun's third letter to Ishaq after receiving the scholars' replies
description: Al-Ma'mun's third letter to Ishaq after receiving the scholars' replies. Recorded under the year 218 AH (833–834 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
